executive_summary: Latest updates from 2 sources covering the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Monitoring 2 key developments. AI analysis refreshing shortly.
execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: UAE and Bahrain only Middle East states joining UK coalition to pressure Iran ov. Exclusive: Greek ships secretly supplying Israel with oil and military cargo. Situation remains active.

key_developments.headline: UAE and Bahrain only Middle East states joining UK coalition to pressure Iran ov
key_developments.detail: Britain is set to host a summit on Thursday aimed at forming an international coalition to pressure Iran into reopening the Strait of Hormuz, after US President Donald Trump said the UK and other countries should "go get their own oil". Key countries in the region, including Saudi Arabia , Oman , Qa
key_developments.fullAnalysis: Britain is set to host a summit on Thursday aimed at forming an international coalition to pressure Iran into reopening the Strait of Hormuz, after US President Donald Trump said the UK and other countries should "go get their own oil". Key countries in the region, including Saudi Arabia , Oman , Qa

key_developments.headline: Exclusive: Greek ships secretly supplying Israel with oil and military cargo
key_developments.detail: Greek shipping companies have been secretly transporting oil, coal and military cargo to Israel , Middle East Eye can reveal. According to a new report, produced by the No Harbour for Genocide campaign and seen exclusively by MEE, at least 57 covert crude oil shipments were delivered to Israeli port
key_developments.fullAnalysis: Greek shipping companies have been secretly transporting oil, coal and military cargo to Israel , Middle East Eye can reveal. According to a new report, produced by the No Harbour for Genocide campaign and seen exclusively by MEE, at least 57 covert crude oil shipments were delivered to Israeli port

terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
